ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1645 Florida Street, San Francisco 94110)
Off Calendar Dec-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via Zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,143,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
